findings.message: The variant-handling fix is still incomplete. The plan now fixes duplicate React keys, but its execution contract only changes keys and does not carry the required type/display changes for distinct operator labels. Current client result/preview types in StockAdjustments.client.tsx:L31 and StockInflows.client.tsx:L20 still drop `variantAttributes`, and current rendering still prints only `item.sku`. Same-base-SKU variants would remain visually ambiguous even after the key change.

The new platform-core validation command is not executable as written. packages/platform-core/package.json has `lint`, `build`, and `test` scripts, but no `typecheck` script, so `pnpm --filter @acme/platform-core typecheck` will fail. The plan should name the actual TS validation gate for that package.
TASK-03 is materially stronger now. It correctly anchors the repository test seam in stockInflows.server.test.ts and removes the earlier uncertainty about test location and setup pattern.
